shots.title: Session landing
shots.alt: MemDiver session landing page in light theme, listing previously saved analysis sessions.

shots.title: Wizard — select data
shots.alt: Wizard step one in light theme with a path input and a file-browser modal open over the workspace.

shots.title: Wizard — analysis algorithms
shots.alt: Wizard step three in light theme showing the eight-algorithm checkbox grid with availability dimming.

shots.title: Workspace — default layout
shots.alt: MemDiver workspace in light theme showing hex viewer, sidebar with six tabs, detail overlay, and bottom analysis panel.

shots.title: Hex viewer with structure overlay
shots.alt: Hex viewer in light theme with a TLS-13 structure overlay highlighting bytes by classification.

shots.title: Entropy profile
shots.alt: Entropy tab in light theme with Shannon entropy plotted against byte offset and high-entropy regions shaded red.

shots.title: Consensus view
shots.alt: Live consensus builder in light theme with uploaded dumps, variance sparkline, and top-variance offsets.

shots.title: Pipeline — oracle stage
shots.alt: Pipeline oracle-stage wizard in light theme showing upload drop-zone and examples tab.

shots.title: Pipeline — run dashboard
shots.alt: Pipeline run dashboard in light theme with stepper on the running stage.

shots.title: Pipeline — results
shots.alt: Pipeline results pane in light theme with stepper on the results stage.

shots.title: Theme triptych
shots.alt: Three workspace panels side by side in light, dark, and dark-plus-high-contrast themes.

shots.title: Workspace — MSL loaded (dark)
shots.alt: MemDiver workspace with the canonical MSL fixture loaded into the hex viewer — dark theme.

shots.title: Workspace — MSL loaded (light)
shots.alt: MemDiver workspace with the canonical MSL fixture loaded into the hex viewer — light theme.
